summary: iter216 Fingerprint-First Recognition - All tests passed. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Desktop Fingerprints tab and Mobile WasteTab both working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test fingerprints created during test execution with unique HSV histograms
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter216 fingerprint-first recognition fully tested. All fingerprint endpoints working: POST /api/waste/fingerprints (contribute), POST /api/waste/fingerprints/query (query), POST /api/waste/fingerprints/{fp_id}/confirm (confirm/promote), GET /api/waste/fingerprints/stats (KPIs), POST /api/waste/capture/preliminary-from-image (Stage-1 progressive). Short-circuit path via /capture/still with pre-populated fingerprint works (vision_mode='fingerprint_local'). Feature flags fingerprint_first and fingerprint_shadow_learn both true. Desktop Fingerprints tab shows 5 KPI tiles (local, pending, collective, total, hitrate) and explain block. Mobile WasteTab renders 7 mode tiles correctly.

frontend: Desktop EchoWaste Panel - Fingerprints tab - PASS (5/5 KPI tiles, explain block present)
Mobile WasteTab - PASS (7/7 mode tiles, no console errors)

known_blockers: Emergent LLM Key budget may be exhausted - Sonnet calls may fail with HTTP 502. Fingerprint short-circuit path does NOT require Claude and works independently.
